title: Speed up stringf/vstringf by 1.8x
body:
The speedup is accomplished by avoiding a heap allocation in the common case where the final string length is less than 128.  Another smaller improvement is from inlining stringf/vstringf.

Benchmark timings from synthesis of a representative circuit:

Bottom-Up view before:
![image](https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/assets/16907534/7f0e384c-fba6-4cef-b612-0ec7ad3ba5a7)

Bottom-Up view After:
![image](https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/assets/16907534/47bb9a3c-fce0-4e89-80fd-11502a41e31e)
